title: DeviceHealthReportedPayload
description: Payload for DEVICE_HEALTH_REPORTED (eventVersion 1, Phase 9, docs/mvp-plan/PRD-Phase-9.md REQ-9.11). Published to aidefense.device-events once per synchronized health snapshot an edge agent uploads via POST /edge/events. Not mission-scoped — deviceId is the Kafka partition key, not a missionId (docs/adr/ADR-011-device-identity-and-sync-transport.md).

deviceId.description: The registered edge device's human-chosen label (edge_devices.device_id), not a UUID surrogate key.

reportedAt.description: When the edge agent recorded this health snapshot — may lag the envelope's occurredAt if this event was buffered offline before syncing.

bufferDepth.description: Number of not-yet-synchronized rows in the edge agent's local SQLite buffer at the time of this report.

lastSyncAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of this device's last successful synchronization before this report, or null if it has never synced.

uptimeSeconds.description: Seconds since the edge agent process started.

status.description: A simple threshold-based self-assessment, not a machine-diagnosed value — "degraded" signals a persistently non-empty/growing buffer or an unreachable local inference sidecar.
